mapper.select: SELECT l.log_number, l.user_number, u.user_nickname, l.log_title, l.log_post, l.log_date, l.log_modify_date, ( SELECT li.log_img_path FROM ddd_log_img li WHERE li.log_number = l.log_number AND li.log_img_number = ( SELECT MIN(li2.log_img_number) FROM ddd_log_img li2 WHERE li2.log_number = l.log_number ) ) AS representative_img_path FROM ddd_log l JOIN ddd_user u ON l.user_number = u.user_number ORDER BY l.log_date ASC
SELECT l.log_number, l.user_number, l.log_title, l.log_post, l.log_date, l.log_modify_date FROM ddd_log l WHERE l.log_number = #{value}

SELECT l.log_number, l.user_number, u.user_nickname, l.log_title, l.log_post, l.log_date, l.log_modify_date FROM ddd_log l JOIN ddd_user u ON l.user_number = u.user_number WHERE l.log_number = #{value}
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_log.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO ddd_log ( log_number, user_number, log_title, log_post, log_date, log_modify_date ) VALUES ( #{logNumber}, #{userNumber}, #{logTitle}, #{logPost}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE ddd_log SET log_title = #{logTitle}, log_post = #{logPost}, log_modify_date = SYSDATE WHERE log_number = #{logNumber}
mapper.select: SELECT log_number, user_number, log_title, log_post, log_date, log_modify_date FROM ddd_log WHERE log_title LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' ORDER BY log_date ASC

SELECT l.log_number, l.user_number, u.user_name, l.log_title, l.log_post, l.log_date, l.log_modify_date FROM ddd_log l JOIN ddd_user u ON l.user_number = u.user_number WHERE u.user_name LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' ORDER BY l.log_date ASC

SELECT c.comment_number, c.log_number, c.user_number, u.user_nickname, c.comment_post, c.comment_date FROM ddd_log_comment c JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number WHERE c.log_number = #{value} ORDER BY c.comment_date ASC
SELECT comment_number, log_number, user_number, comment_post, comment_date FROM ddd_log_comment WHERE comment_number = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ddd_log_comment ( comment_number, log_number, user_number, comment_post, comment_date ) VALUES ( seq_log_comment.NEXTVAL, #{logNumber}, #{userNumber}, #{commentPost}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT log_img_number, log_number, log_img_path FROM ddd_log_img WHERE log_number = #{value} ORDER BY log_img_number ASC
SELECT log_img_number, log_number, log_img_path FROM ddd_log_img WHERE log_number = #{value} AND log_img_number = ( SELECT MIN(log_img_number) FROM ddd_log_img WHERE log_number = #{value} )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ddd_log_img ( log_img_number, log_number, log_img_name, log_img_path ) VALUES ( seq_log_img.NEXTVAL, #{logNumber}, #{logImgName}, #{logImgPath} )
